_template.purpose: Generic feature tracking manifest for AI-assisted development.
_template.instructions: Replace every __PLACEHOLDER__ with your project's values. Remove the entire _template and _example sections before use. Keys starting with '_' are metadata — delete them for production.

features.name: __SNAKE_CASE_FEATURE_NAME__

features.description: __What this feature does and why it exists__

_example.description: A CLI tool to scaffold and manage CI/CD harnesses

features.name: user_auth
features.title: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to log in via GitHub OAuth so they can access private harnesses
acceptance: User can initiate GitHub OAuth flow from the CLI
User is prompted to open a browser and enter a code
Session token is stored securely after successful authentication
Expired tokens are rejected with a clear error message

_example._note: This is just illustrative — delete this _example section in your real file.
